feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: After saving the Sales contract, getting error decimal places are not permitted.
While saving the Sales contract getting error of Decimal places are not permitted.
How SAP SD module is implemented at Maritime Ports?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am in talk with one  SAP company for implementing SAP modules like SD,FICO,HR etc at one of the big maritime ports in India. Can any one tell me how SAP is implemented  in maritime ports?

Your suggestion will be very helpful before i join the project.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Wrong delivery date - Quote Order to Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello

We are facing some issues when sales orders are created referencing quote orders,

The deliveries are created with the wrong delivery promise date, in sales order it should be 3 days starting from  quote date creation, but it's not take on.

We had a recent migration from ECC to S/4, I checked the legacy system and all the configuration are similar in both environment 

Could you please help with this topic

entry.title: To control Text types for output document
entry.content:
For sales order- all the text types, if maintained in the document are getting populated in the output document (Order confirmation).

This should not be the case as we also have internal text types and text types which help in communication between teams/LOB’s which should not be sent to the Customer.

Can the text types that are seen in the output document be controlled.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales NW ABAP Print and Output Management 

#

entry.title: Main Segments and segments only in Credit Management
entry.content: I want to know the use of main segments and segments only and how it works in Credit Management

entry.title: Empty sales area BP tcode
entry.content:
Hi,

After ECC conversion to S4/HANA, the BP tcode does not appear in the input with the sales area.  I can create and expand to the sales areas, but the selection made is not visible.

Any suggestions or SAP notes for this point?

Best Regards,

Daniel Cunha

entry.title: How to view deleted pricing condition records in SAP S4 Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have deleted pricing conditions records and modified tables, we want to view the condition records set for deletion. 

In v/06 we have maintained - Set deletion flag option.

In Manage prices app we tried filter Release status = Request Deletion but we are unable to view records set for deletion. In Set service prices app, we can only view one condition record. But we want to view all condition records those are set for deletion. 

Next issue is to delete all these condition records from database. How can we achieve this with current settings (as mentioned above). We doesn't want to change the V/06 settings but want to delete the condition records marked for deletion from database. 

Appreciate your contributions on these issues.

Regards

Sai

entry.title: Changing of Risk categories
entry.content:
In our business, the finance department want to change the risk categories.  When you change it within FD32, it responds to run program RVKRED09.

What is the risk if you do not run it, as we are using our own credit check, and the standard credit check is only setup for a warning, no block?

entry.title: Sales header text fields need to copy from quotation to order
entry.content: I have created some text fields in sales quotation documet and created. While im creating sale order with reference to that particular quotation, text field input data's are not copied. reference image attached.

entry.title: Error in Scrap Sales Order
entry.content:
While creating scrap sale order below error occurred. Please do the needful.
"Material 8000000011 is not defined for sales org. D001, distr.chan.40, language EN" 
"Sales from sales organization, D001 dist. chan.40, plant D101 are not defined"

entry.title: Credit Control Block is displaying as B
entry.content:
Dear Friends

I am working in ECC 6.0.

In Transaction code VKM3, the Sales documents in column Customer review date is displaying as B.

Sales Order does not show any block in VA03 in Billing document tab.

In Transaction code OVA8, Credit Control is static and A. Next review date and open items is A.

Max.open.item% is 1 and No of days open is 1.

Please let me know, why the system is displaying B and what should I check and to prevent it in the future?


Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: How to change the Sales Group description
entry.content:
How can we change the description of a sales group?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: LOAD_PROGRAM_TABLE_MISMATCH error
entry.content:
The "load_program_table_mismatch" error in SAP usually means there's a problem with the versions of some program files not matching up correctly. Here's a simple explanation of why it happens and how to fix it:

Why it happens:
System Update: If your SAP system was recently updated or patched, it might cause some files to be out of sync.
Incomplete Changes: If some program changes weren't properly loaded or imported into the system, this mismatch can occur.
Temporary Issues: Sometimes, the system's temporary memory (called the buffer) might get messed up or outdated.

The "load_program_table_mismatch" error in SAP usually means there's a problem with the versions of some program files not matching up correctly. Here's a simple explanation of why it happens and how to fix it:

Why it happens:
System Update: If your SAP system was recently updated or patched, it might cause some files to be out of sync.
Incomplete Changes: If some program changes weren't properly loaded or imported into the system, this mismatch can occur.
Temporary Issues: Sometimes, the system's temporary memory (called the buffer) might get messed up or outdated.
How to fix it:
Refresh Memory: Clear the system's temporary memory to make it reload the correct versions of the programs.
Re-import Changes: Make sure all changes or updates to the system were fully and correctly applied.
Check for Updates: Look into any recent updates or patches to see if there are known issues or additional steps needed.
System Check: Run a system check to find and fix any inconsistencies.
Solution 1:

Issue: LOAD_PROGRAM_TABLE_MISMATCH

The error occurred because the SAP system was recently updated or patched, causing some files to be out of sync.

The error won't occur after the upgrade process was completed.

Solution 2:

In some cases you need to regenerate specific coding and tables.

Regenerate programs

Use program TOUCHSRC.

Use program name as TOUCHTAB or TOUCHALL and execute.

you'll get the confirmation as Program touched successfully.

entry.title: Removing Data for Multiple Company Codes in SAP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently researching data deletion processes within the SAP FI, MM, SD, CO, and PP modules. I have a specific scenario that I need help with:

A company in Russia has acquired a firm from Turkey, which operates with seven different company codes. These company codes have been successfully copied into the new system. However, the company now needs to delete all data related to six of these company codes.

I am looking for guidance on the best approach to achieve this, with a focus on the following modules(note that these modules are just examples):

  • FI (Financial Accounting) Module: How to delete customers, general ledger accounts, and vendors associated with the specific company codes.
  • MM (Materials Management) Module: How to delete purchasing documents related to the specific company codes.
  • SD (Sales and Distribution) Module: How to delete sales orders linked to the specific company codes.

What are the recommended steps and methods for performing these deletions? Any detailed instructions or best practices would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Sales billing output XML - Not getting archived
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have custom sales billing output generated in XML format with Transmission Medium - 5 (External Email), communication method->Storage- Archive is set. Expectation is that the XML send email or file needs to be attached to GOS-Attachment list, but it is not getting attached as expected, it is working fine for PDF output.

I tried creating new custom archive document type and mapped XML instead of OTF but still it is not working. 

If anyone could please share your experience for this solution. Is it possible to attach XML billing output to Archive. If so any specific configuration to be done. We are using S4 Version - Release - 103- NACE output model is being used.

SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Regards,

Mythily

entry.title: BAPI TO CREATE CUSTOMER MATERIAL INFO RECORD CLASSIFICATION (VD51)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to create Customer Material Info Record Classification in VD51 with respective customer code and Material Number.

How to create that using BAPI?

What BAPI is available for that? 

Reg, 
Prakash

entry.title: Generating E-way Bills under Bill to and Ship to Scenario
entry.content:
I have Scenario, Sold to party and Bill to party is from Hyderabad(A), Ship to party is in Maharashtra (B) And Plant is in Maharashtra (C). So invoice generated with IGST. But from GST side we are getting error as, 'For the Intra state transaction, IGST amount is not applicable; only CGST and SGST amount are applicable for the document.

So, I think it is the case of E-way Bills under Bill to and Ship to Scenario. Where  C create Invoice against the A, and A create Invoice against the B. So, How it is to be adopted in SAP. Also, help me if I am taking wrong understanding.

entry.title: No delivery-relevant items in order xxxx, order type ZNWO
entry.content:
No delivery-relevant items in order xxxx, order type xxxx

Message No. VL455

Sale order created from va01

Delivery creation error.

entry.title: Promotion number not appear in VBKD
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

In  the sales order  the number of promotion field "WAKTION "  is empty in table VBKD 

In conditions record of the sales order the promotion is determined KONP-AKTNR ok ( and we can display the promotion in tcode WAK3 )

in the customizing  path logistics-general -Retail promotion -promotion determination in sales order- determination for sales area  is checked 

Is there any configuration missing to fill   VBKD -WAKtion field ? please advice 

Thank you
